Yadav.bio: Teen owners me se ek. Dost sabke — par khulke baat kisi se nahi kar paata. Feelings type karta hai, delete karta hai, phir screen lock kar deta hai.

Maya.bio: Pehli baar me lagta hai sab samajh aa gaya — par har baar kuch naya chhupa hota hai. Sweet hai, caring hai — par kuch hai jo wo batati nahi.

Yash.bio: Yadav ka sabse kareeb dost. Mazaak har baat pe — par jab baat serious hoti hai, sabse pehle khada hota hai. Sab pehle isko pata chalta hai, aur sab pehle ye leak bhi karta hai.

Ashish.bio: Bakchodi ka baadshah. Har serious moment ko ek meme bana deta hai. Yash ke saath milke duniya jalaa de.
